ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Title or topic of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "vote_up" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the post has received */,
  "vote_down" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the post has received */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the post */,
  "last_post_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last post or reply */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum where the post is located */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post (e.g., question, discussion, announcement) */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., residential, commercial, room share) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the property */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the post belongs to */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords for the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., member, moderator, admin) */,
  "reputation" INTEGER /* Reputation points earned by the user */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum */,
  "forum_name" TEXT /* Name of the forum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forum */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the forum belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being replied to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the reply */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the reply */,
  "reply_date" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was posted */,
  "parent_reply_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent reply (if it's a nested reply) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_parent_reply_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_reply_id") REFERENCES replies ("reply_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that was voted on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who cast the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date and time the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., post, reply, vote) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time the activity occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being reported */,
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reply being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the report */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, resolved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reply_id FOREIGN KEY ("reply_id") REFERENCES replies ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)
